title: Melicope irifica
taxonomy: Melicope irifica is classified within the family Rutaceae, which is commonly known as the citrus or rue family. It belongs to the order Sapindales and the class Magnoliopsida. This plant is a species within the genus Melicope, which contains a large number of species found in the Pacific Islands and Australia. Melicope irifica is further classified as a species of flowering plant, specifically a shrub or small tree. The exact classification of Melicope irifica may vary depending on the source, but it is generally classified within the Rutaceae family.
